title: Dashboard glob reads — rewrite server to read new context tree directly
description: After the context tree migration, the dashboard server still reads from deleted/renamed paths (state/, inbox/, done/, intelligence/, lessons.md, backlog.md, features/active/done/). Rewrite ALL server, script, MCP, and frontend code to glob source files directly from the new structure. Kill the indexer (index-state.ts) — dashboard reads goal.json, project.json, directive.json, backlog.json directly.

dod.criterion: npm run type-check passes with zero errors
Dashboard loads and renders all 3 pages (dashboard, projects, insights) with real data from .context/
Zero references to state/, inbox/, done/, intelligence/, backlog.md, features/ in server/, scripts/, mcp-server/
MCP tools (status, backlog, directive) return correct data from new paths
Foreman scheduler can find and launch directives from directives/ directory

verify.reviewer_rationale: Architecture/infrastructure domain — server rewrite with many integration points
verify.browser_test_rationale: Dashboard UI must render with real data after server rewrite

tasks.title: Rewrite work-item-types.ts — update TypeScript types for new entity shapes
Rewrite state-watcher.ts — glob goal.json/project.json/directive.json/backlog.json directly instead of reading state/*.json
Update context-watcher.ts — remove state/ dir ignore, adjust trigger patterns for new file layout
Update goal-watcher.ts — watch goal.json files instead of inventory.json
Rewrite server/index.ts — update API endpoints (features→projects), fix findInboxWork→findDirectives, fix findBacklogWork to read backlog.json, remove hardcoded lessons.md path
Rewrite scripts/index-state.ts — either delete entirely or rewrite as cache layer over glob reads
Update scripts/foreman.ts — read directives/ instead of inbox/, read backlog.json instead of backlog.md, fix lessons path
Update scripts/intelligence-trends.ts — intel/ path, remove proposals.log dependency
Rewrite mcp-server/tools/ — update paths.ts, status.ts (glob source), backlog.ts (read/write JSON), directive.ts (read directives/ not inbox/)
Update CLI scaffolding — init.ts creates directives/ not inbox/+done/, templates reference goal.json+backlog.json+projects/
Update frontend — rename features→projects in API fetchers, update type fields (hasGoalMd→hasGoalJson), update ProjectsPage empty state message
Verify — type-check passes, dashboard loads, all pages render with real data
